content_body: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Toccoa Tails this past week. The house was very comfortable and the river was lovely each day. My husband enjoyed the hot tub and the dog loved the yard, even though I had to carry him up and down the steps. The kitchen was nice and we had everything we needed since there were only two of us. It was very quiet and restful for a vacation. We even extended our stay by two days to enjoy ourselves a little longer.
title: A Very Quiet And Restful Vacation
